title: elaeophorbia drupifera
intro: Elaeophorbia drupifera, also known as the elephant's tooth tree, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Elaeophorbia drupifera include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusion or decoction, and its bark is also used in traditional medicine.
